description: Indicates the user name of the client.
examples:
Command Example
forescout-get-host ip=192.168.1.212 fields=fsapi_DemistoTest,fsapi_demisto_composite,fsapi_demisto_list,fsapi_composite_1
Context Example
{
"Forescout.Host": {
"MACAddress": null,
"IPAddress": "192.168.1.212",
"ID": "3232235988"
name: forescout-get-host

outputs.description: An endpoint may match multiple profiles. This property indicates all the classification profiles that this endpoint matches. Forescout.Host.EngineSeenPacket Indicates the host was seen by CounterACT.
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.MatchedFingerprint

outputs.description: Host is online. Forescout.Host.PrimClassification Indicates the most specific endpoint function detected. If CounterACT detects multiple endpoint functions, the property is resolved as the most specific value that is common to all the detected functions. If there is no common value, the property is resolved as ‘Multiple Suggestions’.
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.Online

outputs.description: Indicates a value associated with the NIC Vendor Forescout.Host.SambaOpenPort NetBIOS ports are open
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.MacVendorString

outputs.description: Indicates the operating system of the endpoint, as determined by classification tools. Forescout.Host.Vendor Network Device Vendor, Type and Model
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.UserDefFp

outputs.description: Indicates the SecureConnector version installed on a Windows host. Forescout.Host.Fingerprint Passive OS detection based on Syn packets
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.AgentVersion

outputs.description: Indicates the last IP that was investigated for this host Forescout.Host.VendorClassification Indicates the most specific vendor and model detected.
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.AccessIP

outputs.description: Indicates if the host is running SecureConnector. Forescout.Host.Onsite Indicates that a host is connected to the organizational network
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.ManageAgent

outputs.description: MAC prefix Forescout.Host.VaNetfunc Reported CDP VoIP device description for VA netfunc
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.MacPrefix32

outputs.description: Nmap-OS Fingerprint(Ver. 7.01) Forescout.Host.NmapDefFp5 Nmap-OS Fingerprint(Ver. 5.3)
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.NmapDefFp7

outputs.description: Indicates the SecureConnector deployment mode installed on the host. Forescout.Host.NmapFp7 Nmap-OS Class(Ver. 7.01) (Obsolete)
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.AgentInstallMode

outputs.description: Indicates how CounterACT determines the Network Function property of the endpoint. Forescout.Host.ClRule Indicates the rule responsible for classifying the host
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.ClType

outputs.description: Indicates the SecureConnector visible mode installed on the host. Forescout.Host.OSClassification Operating System
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.AgentVisibleMode

outputs.description: Indicates how the Operating System classification property was determined for this endpoint. Forescout.Host.LastNbtReportTime Last time when NBT name was reported
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.ClassificationSourceOS

outputs.description: Miscellaneous Forescout.Host.ClassificationSourceFunc Indicates how the Function classification property was determined for this endpoint.
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.Misc

outputs.description: Nmap-Network Function(Ver. 7.01) Forescout.Host.MAC ARP Spoofing (Obsolete)
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.NmapNetfunc7

outputs.description: Open Ports Forescout.Host.GstSignedInStat Logged In Status
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.OpenPort

outputs.description: The device class according to the DHCP fingerprint Forescout.Host.ADM Admission Events.
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.DhcpClass

outputs.description: The host DHCP request fingerprint Forescout.Host.DhcpOptFingerprint The host DHCP options fingerprint
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.DhcpReqFingerprint

outputs.description: Indicates the last time that IPv4 reported to the infrastructure Forescout.Host.DhcpOS The device OS according to the DHCP fingerprint
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.Ipv4ReportTime

outputs.description: The device Host Name as advertised by DHCP Forescout.Host.IPAddress Host IP address
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.DhcpHostname

outputs.description: Host MAC address Forescout.Host.ID Forescout ID number for the host
outputs.name: Forescout.Host.MACAddress

outputs.description: IP Address of the host. Endpoint.MACAddress MAC Address of the host.
outputs.name: Endpoint.IPAddress

outputs.description: Endpoint DHCP Server. Endpoint.Hostname Hostname of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.DHCPServer

outputs.description: Endpoint Operating System. Endpoint.Model Vendor and Model of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.OS

outputs.description: Domain of the endpoint.
outputs.name: Endpoint.Domain
